search_document:
User Request: Revenue by region.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Revenue by Region
Type: chart
Description: Revenue distribution across different regions
Title: Top Regions by Revenue
Type: table
Description: Regions generating the highest revenue
Title: Total Revenue
Type: kpi
Description: Overall revenue across all regions

sql_queries.title: Revenue by Region
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.Region, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN [Order Details] od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Employees e ON o.EmployeeID = e.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.Region

sql_queries.title: Top Regions by Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT e.Region, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS Revenue FROM Orders o JOIN [Order Details] od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID JOIN Employees e ON o.EmployeeID = e.EmployeeID GROUP BY e.Region ORDER BY Revenue DESC LIMIT 5

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN [Order Details] od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID
